author: fwyzard
body:
#### PR description:

Backport of various MPI-related PRs to CMSSW 16.0.x:
  - #50496
  - #50702
  - #50752
  - #50678
  - #50810
  - #50821

#### PR validation:

Tested in 17.0.x IBs, and in a dedicated high-statistic test based on CMSSW 16.1.x plus backports.

#### Backport status

Backport of various MPI-related PRs to CMSSW 16.0.x, to be tested online.
title: Backport MPI-related developments [16.0.x]
